## beehiiv publications

Work with Beehiiv publications

### Synopsis

List the publications available to your current Beehiiv session and inspect a single publication when you already know the publication ID.

```
beehiiv publications [flags]
```

### Examples

```
beehiiv publications list
beehiiv publications get pub_123
beehiiv publications show pub_123
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help   help for publications
```

### Options inherited from parent commands

```
      --api-key string          Override the Beehiiv API key
      --base-url string         Override the API base URL
      --compact                 Print compact JSON
      --config string           Override the settings file location
      --debug                   Print request URLs to stderr
      --output string           Choose the output format (json, table, raw)
      --publication-id string   Override the Beehiiv publication ID
      --rate-limit-rpm int      Override the internal rate limit
      --raw                     Shorthand for --output raw
      --table                   Shorthand for --output table
      --timeout string          Override the request timeout, e.g. 45s
      --verbose                 Print request and response details to stderr
```
